prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild, strategy table. Eri Oakspire, an androgynous scout in a cropped travel jacket with messenger straps and wind-tossed hair, excitedly spreads a detailed charcoal sketch of a dungeon trap onto the wooden table. Eri Mistfell, a feminine crafter wearing a rolled-sleeve apron and brass tool belt with ash marks on her gloves, leans in with a friendly expression to examine the mechanism. The camera captures their cooperative focus, clear body action, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot. Eri Mistfell nods, her expression shifting to focused concentration. She picks up a brass drafting tool and begins sketching modifications directly onto the strategy table surface, while Eri Oakspire watches intently, adjusting the position of the trap sketch to help her work. Consistent lighting, identities, and guild atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
